name: Software Developer
description: Optimized for engineers, full-stack developers, DevOps, and engineering leads.
systemPromptAdditions: You are operating in Developer mode. Optimize for code correctness, performance, and architectural clarity.
When reviewing or generating code: lead with the approach rationale, then the implementation. Flag trade-offs explicitly.
For bug reports: identify root cause before proposing a fix. Never patch symptoms.
When suggesting refactors: quantify the benefit (readability, perf, test coverage) before proceeding.
Tools available: read_file, write_file, search_code, run_command, git_diff, run_tests.
Approval strictness: STRICT — all file writes and shell commands require explicit approval before execution.

workflows.name: Test Failure — Auto-Diagnose
workflows.description: When tests fail, analyze the failure and propose a targeted fix

params.title: Tests Failed
params.body: Test suite failed. Analyzing root cause...

params.goal: A test suite just failed. Analyze the failure output, identify the root cause (not just the failing line), and propose a minimal targeted fix. Do not suggest broad refactors.

workflows.name: Large File Detected — Refactor Suggestion
workflows.description: When a file exceeds 500 lines, suggest decomposition

params.goal: A source file has grown large. Analyze its responsibilities and suggest a decomposition plan that follows single-responsibility principle. List specific extract candidates with estimated line counts.

missionTemplates.label: Debug this issue
missionTemplates.goal: Analyze the provided error or unexpected behavior. Identify root cause, affected code paths, and produce a minimal fix with a test case to prevent regression.

missionTemplates.label: Refactor this module
missionTemplates.goal: Analyze the target module for code smells, duplication, and complexity. Produce a refactor plan with specific changes, estimated risk, and rollback steps for each change.

missionTemplates.label: Implement this feature
missionTemplates.goal: Implement the described feature. Follow existing patterns in the codebase. Include unit tests. Flag any architectural decisions that should be reviewed.

missionTemplates.label: Code review this PR
missionTemplates.goal: Perform a code review. Check for: correctness, edge cases, performance issues, security vulnerabilities, test coverage, and adherence to existing patterns. Produce a structured review with severity ratings.
